case_title: VALANCE STEELE VS. FENG YU ZHEN et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-27-2013 CONTINUED TO APR-10-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-09-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-09-2013 CONTINUED TO AUG-27-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. ***NOTE: IF THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE, ANSWER(S), OR DEFAULT(S) AND NO PAYMENT OF OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS BY THE AUG-27-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING, THE COURT INTENDS TO DISMISS THE MATTER.*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING AUG-27-2013 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-21-2013 CONTINUED TO JUL-09-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-27-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEELE, VALANCE AS TO DEFENDANT ZHEN, FENG YU DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-27-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-26-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-13-2013
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-21-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-21-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-10-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST VALANCE STEELE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-21-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-07-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST VALANCE STEELE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-09-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-25-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
